name: Guanlan Skill Store
stage: Read-only Skill Ops audit and dashboard semantic contract
scope: Operations-console Skill Store dashboard, governed current skills, usage overrides, cleanup lifecycle, explicit repair-only mirror synchronization, read-only drift audit, and an independent semantic contract for dashboard version, governed metadata, summary counts, mirror state, duplicate names, cleanup queue, and public path safety.

upgrade_policy.patch: Fix dashboard display, metadata wording, examples, evals, or sync handling without changing governance flow.
upgrade_policy.minor: Add a new governed skill lane, new required metadata field, new audit gate, or new lifecycle state.
upgrade_policy.major: Change the Skill Store governance model, registry contract, or Daily Loop integration contract.
